footer.v: 1 - Còn sử dụng, 0 - Không còn sử dụng

command.text: declare @$exists nvarchar(512), @$recordHasBeenChanged nvarchar(512), @$updateConflict nvarchar(512), @$deleteConflict nvarchar(512) select @$exists = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã kho %s1 và vị trí %s2 đã có hoặc lồng nhau trong danh mục vị trí kho.' else N'The record consisting of site %s1 and location %s2 is invalid or already exists.' end select @$updateConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã kho %s1 và vị trí %s2 đã phát sinh, không thể sửa được.' else N'Cannot edit the record consisting of site %s1 and location %s2. It has already been used.' end select @$deleteConflict = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Mã kho %s1 và vị trí %s2 đã phát sinh, không thể xóa được.' else N'Cannot delete the record consisting of site %s1 and location %s2. It has already been used.' end select @$recordHasBeenChanged = case when @@language = 'v' then N'Kho %s1 và vị trí %s2 đã được sửa hoặc xóa bởi người sử dụng khác.' else N'The record consisting of site %s1 and location %s2 has been modified or deleted by another user.' end

if exists(select * from @@table where (ma_kho = @ma_kho and ma_vi_tri = @ma_vi_tri) or (ma_kho = @ma_kho and ma_vi_tri like rtrim(@ma_vi_tri) + '%') or (ma_kho = @ma_kho and rtrim(@ma_vi_tri) like rtrim(ma_vi_tri) + '%')) begin select 'ma_vi_tri' as field, replace(replace(@$exists, '%s1', rtrim(@ma_kho)), '%s2', rtrim(@ma_vi_tri)) as message return end select @datetime0 = getdate(), @datetime2 = getdate(), @user_id0 = @@userID, @user_id2 = @@userID

if not exists(select * from @@table where ma_kho = $ma_kho.OldValue and ma_vi_tri = $ma_vi_tri.OldValue) begin select 'ma_vi_tri' as field, replace(replace(@$recordHasBeenChanged, '%s1', rtrim($ma_kho.OldValue)), '%s2', rtrim($ma_vi_tri.OldValue)) as message return end
if @ma_kho <> $ma_kho.OldValue or @ma_vi_tri <> $ma_vi_tri.OldValue begin if exists(select * from @@table where (not (ma_kho = $ma_kho.OldValue and ma_vi_tri = $ma_vi_tri.OldValue)) and ((ma_kho = @ma_kho and ma_vi_tri = @ma_vi_tri) or (ma_kho = @ma_kho and ma_vi_tri like rtrim(@ma_vi_tri) + '%') or (ma_kho = @ma_kho and rtrim(@ma_vi_tri) like rtrim(ma_vi_tri) + '%'))) begin select 'ma_vi_tri' as field, replace(replace(@$exists, '%s1', rtrim(@ma_kho)), '%s2', rtrim(@ma_vi_tri)) as message return end if exists(select top 1 1 as val from ct70 where ma_kho = $ma_kho.OldValue and ma_vi_tri = $ma_vi_tri.OldValue) begin select 'ma_kho' as field, replace(replace(@$updateConflict, '%s1', rtrim($ma_kho.OldValue)), '%s2', rtrim($ma_vi_tri.OldValue)) as message return end end
update @@table set datetime2 = getdate(), user_id2 = @@userID where ma_kho = @ma_kho and ma_vi_tri = @ma_vi_tri

if exists(select top 1 1 as val from ct70 where ma_kho = @ma_kho and ma_vi_tri = @ma_vi_tri) begin select replace(replace(@$deleteConflict, '%s1', rtrim(@ma_kho)), '%s2', rtrim(@ma_vi_tri)) as message return end
